notes: Target = retail forex trader evaluating an AI product. The three-questions-above-the-fold framing (how long, up/down, worst-loss) drives KPI tile ordering. Watch for: cold-start empty state feeling scary; Sharpe appearing too early below the 30-day floor; monotone-up early curves reading as 'no risk'.

Colour-blind palette (green/red equity with zero-line dashed grey)
SVG has aria-label; skeleton has role=progressbar
Mobile mock at 375 px produced alongside desktop
